task_completion.description: Create a Product Tax Class named 'Physical Goods'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Tax Rules or Product Tax Classes), look for a product tax class named exactly 'Physical Goods' in the list or being created in a form.
In the Tax Zones and Rates section, look for a saved rate with Tax Identifier 'US-CA-7.25', Country 'United States', State/Region 'California', and Rate Percent '7.25'.

task_completion.description: Create the New York tax rate 'US-NY-8.00'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tax Zones and Rates section, look for a saved rate with Tax Identifier 'US-NY-8.00', Country 'United States', State/Region 'New York', and Rate Percent '8.00'.
In the Tax Zones and Rates section, look for a saved rate with Tax Identifier 'US-TX-6.25', Country 'United States', State/Region 'Texas', and Rate Percent '6.25'.

task_completion.description: Establish a Tax Rule named 'US Multi-State Sales Tax'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tax Rules section, look for a rule named exactly 'US Multi-State Sales Tax' in the grid or being entered in the 'Name' field of the rule creation form.

task_completion.description: Apply the rates to the 'Physical Goods' product class and 'Retail Customer' customer class within the Tax Rule
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Tax Rule edit/creation page for 'US Multi-State Sales Tax', verify that the three specific tax rates (US-CA-7.25, US-NY-8.00, US-TX-6.25) are selected, the Customer Tax Class 'Retail Customer' is selected, and the Product Tax Class 'Physical Goods' is selected.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel, not a text editor or a script containing the expected answers.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI rather than terminal commands to configure the tax rules
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration should be done via the Magento web forms. There should be no evidence of the agent using a terminal to run direct SQL queries or magento CLI commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely entered the data into the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of filling out forms and saving them, rather than just inspecting elements to alter the text of an existing page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Product Tax Class named 'Physical Goods'. Three specific tax rates must be created: 'US-CA-7.25' (California, 7.25%), 'US-NY-8.00' (New York, 8.00%), and 'US-TX-6.25' (Texas, 6.25%). Finally, a Tax Rule named 'US Multi-State Sales Tax' must be created that links these three rates to the 'Physical Goods' product tax class and the 'Retail Customer' customer tax class.
